sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check square positions
seg = current_frame.segmentation
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'S':
        b = n['boundary']
        rows = [p[0] for p in b]
        cols = [p[1] for p in b]
        key = 'left' if min(cols) < 30 else 'right'
        print(f"{key}: top-left=({min(rows)},{min(cols)})")

# Print ascii around the squares
ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
print("\nRows 14-20:")
for r in range(14, 21):
    row_str = ""
    for c in range(4, 54):
        ch = ascii_lines[r][c]
        if ch == 'B': row_str += '#'
        elif ch == 'S': row_str += 'S'
        elif ch == 'M': row_str += 'M'
        elif ch == 'p': row_str += 'p'
        else: row_str += '.'
    print(f"  {r:2d}: {row_str}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
